idea_text: SmartPatch: a single-use transdermal sweat patch with colorimetric microfluidics and NFC readout that claims real-time quantitative electrolyte loss for athletes.

appeal_cases.weak: Trust me, athletes will love this and the science is solid.
appeal_cases.strong: We completed two university validation studies showing ±12% sodium correlation vs blood draw, signed LOIs with two NCAA programs, and filed a provisional patent on our calibration algorithm.

idea_text: AI-integrated wireless earbud and app for haggling in dense multilingual street markets. Ambient audio translates merchant speech in-ear within one second, with offline dialect models for regional pricing vernacular.

appeal_cases.weak: We just need funding to finish the app.
appeal_cases.strong: Pilot with 400 Bangkok market vendors showed 38% higher successful negotiation rate; offline Thai-Lao dialect pack ships on-device under 800MB.

idea_text: AI compliance copilot for hospitals that maps clinical workflows to HIPAA and Joint Commission requirements, auto-generates audit evidence, and flags policy gaps before surveys.

appeal_cases.weak: Hospitals need this and AI is hot right now.
appeal_cases.strong: Three hospital pilots, two signed LOIs worth $180k ARR, buyer is the compliance VP with budget from existing audit spend.

idea_text: Crowdsourced pothole and road hazard detection app where drivers' phone accelerometers and dashcam uploads feed a municipal AI triage queue with automated work-order routing.

appeal_cases.weak: Citizens want better roads so cities will pay.
appeal_cases.strong: Paid pilot with one county public works department; 62% of flagged hazards confirmed by inspectors within 72 hours.

idea_text: We are building the next big AI platform to revolutionize everything using blockchain and Web3 synergies. Details coming soon.

appeal_cases.strong: We have 10k waitlist signups and a stealth MVP.

idea_text: Vertical payroll API for US home-health agencies: embedded compliance with state Medicaid EVV rules, 99.95% uptime SLA, $2.1M ARR, 140% net revenue retention, 18-month payback on outbound sales.

appeal_cases.weak: Growth is great and we will expand internationally soon.
appeal_cases.strong: Signed enterprise contract with top-5 home-health chain adds $900k ARR starting Q3.

idea_text: ChatGPT wrapper that summarizes PDFs for students. Free tier with premium $9/mo for unlimited uploads.

appeal_cases.strong: 40k MAU, 8% free-to-paid conversion, proprietary citation graph reduces hallucinations in blind evals.

idea_text: AI tool that reads privacy policies and terms of service and highlights data-sharing clauses in plain language for consumers.

appeal_cases.strong: Browser extension with 120k installs; affiliate partnerships with two legal-tech vendors.

idea_text: At-home continuous glucose monitor sold DTC with a subscription coaching app. No FDA clearance yet; using off-the-shelf sensor modules from Alibaba.

appeal_cases.weak: We will figure out regulatory later.
appeal_cases.strong: Pre-submission meetings scheduled with FDA; clinical advisor is former Abbott CGM lead.

idea_text: Open-source LLM observability SDK with one-line integration for tracing prompts, costs, and eval scores in production Python and Node apps.

appeal_cases.strong: 12k GitHub stars, 600 production installs, paid cloud tier at $40k ARR.

idea_text: Influencer coin marketplace where fans buy creator tokens for exclusive DMs and early content access.

appeal_cases.weak: Web3 is the future of creator economy.
appeal_cases.strong: Legal opinion letter says utility token; 50 creators onboarded in beta.

idea_text: Autonomous pallet-moving robots for mid-size warehouses under 100k sqft, sold as RaaS at $3k/month per robot with remote teleop fallback.

appeal_cases.weak: Robotics is exploding and labor is expensive.
appeal_cases.strong: Two live deployments, 14-hour daily utilization, ROI payback in 11 months per site.
